clusters.justification: This domain encompasses the high-level processing of physiological arousal, emotional valence, and mood states, functionally mapping onto the macroscopic co-activation patterns of limbic and salience networks.
This domain captures the computation of incentives, subjective reward, and motivation to guide decision-making, which is canonically subserved by large-scale mesolimbic and fronto-striatal circuitry.
This domain reflects internally directed, abstract representational processes concerning the self, autobiographical past, and social others, anchored functionally by the default mode network.
